spec.description: Physical disk throughput: nvme0n1 (Crucial P1 1TB), sda (WD 1TB HDD), sdb (WD 8TB HDD). ZFS virtual disks excluded.

spec.title: Host Network I/O

spec.description: Disk capacity for all storage: / (NVMe pve-root), /mnt/bckpHDD (sda1 backup HDD), ZFS pool vm-8tb-hdd0 (full 7.3TB pool including all VM zvols), and LXC container subvolumes. Data from proxmox-node-exporter on port 9101.
spec.title: Disk Capacity
